name: OnPoint AI Stylist
description: Autonomous AI fashion stylist with spending controls, transparent reasoning, and self-custodial payments. Provides real-time style analysis, personalized recommendations, and autonomous shopping with full user control.

commerce.description: Buy fashion items from curator storefronts with cUSD on Celo. Curators are paid their share on-chain in the same flow.
flow: GET directory — curators with agentCommerceEnabled accept agent orders
GET storefront — listings carry agentCommerce.offers with cUSD prices
POST order {listingId, size, quantity} — returns 402 with payment requirements
Transfer the cUSD amount to payTo on Celo, then re-POST with paymentTxHash
201 response includes order, payment and curator payout Celoscan links
